title: Bundle of Triplewax 500ml Wash and Wax Shampoo Cleaner for Extra Shine + 3-in-1 Microfibre Wash Mitt Gentle, Streak-Free Car Cleaning and Polishing Kit
features: OUTSTANDING SHINE & PROTECTION: Triplewax Shampoo Cleaner leaves your vehicle with a long-lasting, streak-free shine, fully prepared for waxing or polishing.
MULTI-PURPOSE 3-IN-1 WASH MITT: Can be used instead of a sponge to wash, trap dust, and clean effectively, including hard-to-reach areas.
POWERFUL CLEANING FORMULA: Cuts through all types of dirt, grime, and road residue, washing away stubborn contaminants with ease while keeping surfaces safe.
SUPER SOFT & HIGHLY ABSORBENT: Premium microfibre construction ensures scratch-free cleaning, maximum absorption, and superior dirt-trapping performance.
ADDITIONAL FEATURES FOR TOUGH MESSES: Includes a bug-shifting panel for baked-on dirt and grime, with all components rigorously tested for durability and reliability.
description: Achieve a spotless, streak-free finish with the Triplewax TCS501 Shampoo Cleaner + 3-in-1 Microfibre Wash Mitt Bundle. Trusted as a top-selling car shampoo, Triplewax TCS501 cuts through all types of dirt and grime, leaving your vehicle’s paintwork fully prepared for waxing and polishing.
